changes.value: All shell execute tests panic at mod.rs:1716 with 'Failed to initialize shell state: No such file or directory'. This is an infrastructure issue with tempdir creation in the test environment. Affected test modules: mcp::tools::shell::execute::tests::*, mcp::tools::shell::tests::*
swissarmyhammer-tools: 46 shell execute tests fail with tempdir panic

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-All shell execute tests panic at mod.rs:1716 with 'Failed to initialize shell state: No such file or directory'. This is an infrastructure issue with tempdir creation in the test environment. Affected test modules: mcp::tools::shell::execute::tests::*, mcp::tools::shell::tests::*
\ No newline at end of file
+All shell execute tests panic at mod.rs:1716 with 'Failed to initialize shell state: No such file or directory'. This is an infrastructure issue with tempdir creation in the test environment. Affected test modules: mcp::tools::shell::execute::tests::*, mcp::tools::shell::tests::* #test-failure
\ No newline at end of file
